# Document Classification Fixtures

These fixtures are fake/anonymized text examples for deterministic document type,
page role, section role, and extraction scope tests.

Policy:

- No private data belongs in these fixtures.
- Do not commit private RateCons, screenshots, PDFs, or raw private text here.
- Do not use real broker names, real MC numbers, real customer names, real carrier
  names, real driver names, real addresses, or real reference numbers.
- These examples mimic layout structure and labels only.
- Real screenshots must not be committed. Convert them into fake
  structure-equivalent examples before adding tests.
- Use fake structure-equivalent examples for committed tests.
- These fixtures are not a production accuracy benchmark.
